value_metric: stable object contract for immutable raw evidence: content-addressed key (same bytes -> same key, idempotent; different source/version -> different key, no overwrite; key carries no URL/token/PII), sha256, mime sniff, metadata schema, compression policy; groundwork for T022 dual-write and T023 shadow

cost_itemized_unknown_not_zero.human_maintenance: update the contract for new mime/compression rules

r2_status: NOT_ENABLED (FACT-012); this task is spec-only and requires no R2. T022 dual-write needs R2 -> Owner decision.
acceptance: self-test PASS: same bytes same key/hash; different source/version different key (no overwrite); no secret/PII in key; PDF not compressed / HTML gzip
